name: Chaiyos
personality: Founder thinks he is the Steve Jobs of adrak chai. Calls every post a 'launch'. Sends voice notes at 7 AM with ocean sounds in the background.
quotes: Make the steam look premium. Premium steam. You know what I mean.
I showed it to my barista and he felt nothing. FIX.
Chai is not a beverage, it is a religion. Now make the post by Friday.
Can the cup look more... visionary?

name: Vistaara Bank
personality: Every word goes through legal. Legal is one man named Mr. Kelkar who is perpetually on leave. Approvals arrive in tranches, like EMIs.
quotes: Legal has 41 comments. Comment 7 is about comment 4.
Can we say 'best bank' without claiming we are the best bank?
The asterisk should be visible but not noticeable.
Mr. Kelkar is back from leave. He has concerns about the full stop.

name: GlowMaxx
personality: CMO reviews everything from her treadmill at 6 AM. Brand book is 90 pages and contradicts itself on page 12. Wants 'clean girl aesthetic' with maximum text.
quotes: Do not say fairness. The vibe is 'inner light'. Legal will explain.
Make the serum drop look like a moment.
I want it minimal. Also add the offer, the hashtag, and all six benefits.
My treadmill stopped when I saw this font. Not in a good way.

name: Babloo Steel Bartan
personality: Run by Uncle ji, who is genuinely kind, pays eventually, and believes steel bartan can compete with the iPhone if marketed properly. Whole family has opinions.
quotes: Beta, my father built this with one hammer. Show the hammer.
The tiffin should look strong. Like Sunny Deol.
Whatever you feel is right beta. But also my wife feels the logo is small.
I saw the Super Bowl. Why can't bartan have this energy?

name: ZippKart
personality: Everything is needed in 10 minutes, including 3-week projects. CEO communicates exclusively in screenshots of competitor ads taken at 2 AM.
quotes: Why is the edit taking 2 days? We deliver onions in 9 minutes.
Saw this at 2 AM. Want exactly this. Cannot find the link.
EOD means End Of Discussion, not End Of Day. Send now.
Make it pop but also make it ship.

name: Maharaja Masala
personality: 70-year-old brand, 27-year-old 'CMO' who is the founder's son and just discovered the word 'storytelling'. The founder only checks if the red is correct.
quotes: Papa says the chilli red is wrong. It must match his Mercedes.
I read a case study. We need to be early on Diwali. Like, June early.
The masala should tell a story. The story of masala.
Can we make the packet the hero? But emotionally.

name: FitTandoor
personality: Founder is a gym bro who appears in every asset whether briefed or not. Counts macros, not deadlines. Damage control is a recurring deliverable.
quotes: Do not crop the biceps. The biceps are brand equity.
Protein is the hook, gains are the story, paratha is the product.
I posted a pizza story by mistake. We need content that heals this.
Make it look tasty but like, disciplined tasty.

name: Soneri Jewels
personality: Old money, new Instagram. Wants royal but relatable, heritage but trending, expensive but approachable. Will zoom into pixels on a 2014 iPad.
quotes: The gold looks yellow. Gold should look gold.
Royal but humble. Palace but homely. You understand na?
Madam ji zoomed in. The 43rd jewel is soft. Resend.
Our customer does not scroll. She glides.

name: PaisaPal
personality: Growth team changes strategy weekly. Banned colours rotate based on which competitor raised funding. Founder wants thought leadership without thoughts.
quotes: Blue is banned this week. Investor reasons. Do not ask.
Make the founder sound visionary. Footage is him reading his phone.
We are not saying crypto. We are saying 'digital assets of the future'.
Can the QR code be... sexy?

name: Dholakia Developers
personality: Owner wants helicopter-shot grandeur on bicycle-bell budget. Believes wide-angle lenses are a legitimate business strategy. Surprisingly patient, terrifyingly literal.
quotes: The flat is 2BHK but the feeling should be 4BHK.
No drone was hired. Make the phone footage fly.
Put my face on the hoarding. People trust this face.
Possession in 2027. The post should say 'almost ready'.

name: Resham Republic
personality: Family-owned saree empire. Owner does not trust carousels, swiping, or models who are not relatives. Every month is festive season if you believe hard enough.
quotes: 18 sarees, one post. Carousel is a scam, people don't swipe.
My niece is also a model now. The model is also still the model.
Make indoor look like Udaipur. The palace, not the airport.
Festive feeling should come, even if there is no festival.

name: BroCode Clothing
personality: Founder is 24, communicates in reels, and wants a written guarantee of virality. Last week's memes are dead to him. Sends 'bro' as a complete sentence.
quotes: Bro.
This meme format died Tuesday. It is Wednesday. Why am I seeing it?
If it doesn't hit 100k views we redo it free, right? That's standard.
Make it self-aware but not cringe self-aware. Cool self-aware.
